calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for Robert Pritchard (Petitioner).

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary admitting the June 8, 2009 will and the November 29, 2010 codicil (subject to review of the order) but makes no determination as to distribution or interpretation of the documents. Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Ates for and with Robert Pritchard.

Ms. Ates stated that she wanted both the 2009 will and the 2010 document titled "My will dated 2010" read together, that it is her understanding that the Decedent wanted to change the disposition of the estate but not the provisions, that the three Grandchildren are to receive the house equally, and that the Decedent wanted to revoke the gift to the Mother because she was being provided for in the insurance policy. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to March 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a supplemental declaration stating how Counsel intends these two documents to be read together and explain how disposition is to go if the 2010 instrument is to be interpreted as a codicil.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
